name: Weather
description: Shows current weather conditions using the free Open-Meteo API. No API key required.

schema.name: location
schema.label: Location
schema.description: City name, zip/post code, or GPS coordinates (lat,lon).

schema.name: refresh_seconds
schema.label: Refresh Every (seconds)
schema.description: How often to re-fetch weather data. Minimum 60s recommended.

schema.name: loop
schema.label: Loop (stay on screen)
schema.description: Keep showing weather indefinitely without advancing.

schema.name: duration
schema.label: Duration (seconds)
schema.description: How long to show this plugin before advancing. Ignored when Loop is on.
